updateProfileSuccess: Your profile has been updated successfully.
updatePasswordSuccess: Your password has been updated successfully.
updateEmailSuccess: A validation link has been sent to your new email address.
unlinkFacebookSuccess: Your account was migrated: Facebook is no longer linked, and you can now sign in with your email and password.
unlinkFacebookIntro: Facebook sign-in is being phased out. Choose an email and password to keep using your account, and we'll send a confirmation link to that address. Clicking the link will unlink Facebook for good.
unlinkFacebookSentInstructions: We sent a confirmation link to %email%. Click it to complete the migration.
unlinkFacebookResendHint: Didn't receive it? Submit the form again to resend.
passwordSameAsIdentifier: Password must be different from your name and email
notFacebookAccount: This account is not linked to Facebook.
changeEmailFail: The link used for your email change is no longer available
apiKeyInformation: API key for reading and writing data via OpenAgenda's API.
apiKeyTiersHelp: A public key (pk) is read-only and safe to embed client-side; a secret key (sk) can also write and must stay private.
keyShownOnce: Copy this key now: it won't be shown again.
removeKeyWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this key?
deleteModalText:
Are you sure you want to delete your account permanently?

Your calendars and events will remain online, you can delete them manually if you do not want to leave them online
email.alreadytaken: This email address is already used
validationEmailContent: Hello, you requested to change the email address associated with your OpenAgenda account.If you are not the author of the request, please ignore this message.
generateNewApiKeyModalText: The old key will be invalidated. Are you sure you want to generate a new one?
chooseEmailsSent: Choose the emails that OpenAgenda sends me
